scenarios.goal: Agent can identify required inputs for a new company before generating CRM artifacts.
Agent has a machine-readable schema for organization, sources, products, accounts, contacts, opportunities and audit events.
Generated facts require source identity, timestamp, confidence and review state.
Swarm roles, approvals, abort conditions and handoff packet are defined.
A generated CRM has an MCP/API surface plan for resources, tools and risk levels.
Blueprint prevents private company data and secrets from entering a public repo.
